name: requirement-gated-python-harness
description: Codex guidance for the requirement-gated Python harness in this library.

interface.shortDescription: Use the local harness with required-document gates and audited tool flow.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex-facing guidance for the requirement-gated Python harness stored in this repository. The plugin points agents to the durable session log, required-document acknowledgement gate, audited tool and sandbox adapters, flow checker, pre-final audit, and repeated-workflow skill export commands.
defaultPrompt: Run a harness turn with required docs
Audit the harness before final output
